name: amocrm-account-manager
description: amoCRM MCP server and skills for designing, creating, auditing, and configuring amoCRM accounts.

interface.shortDescription: Manage and configure amoCRM accounts with MCP and skills.
interface.longDescription: Tools and workflows for amoCRM account architecture: create pipelines, statuses, fields, catalogs, tags, test entities, and niche-specific CRM setups using a long-lived token.
